synergies.description: very good with olaf, the speedups make him impossible to escape unless you flash or dash over walls
solid to just stay on him and provide extra value.
you can get into the middle of the enemy team extremely fast and get a very big ultimate angle for galio.
his ult can give you decent stall time until you get to a fight, and his portal allows you to get into a fight from even better angles.
strong engage and speedups, always solid for olaf
he can lock down one person very well and you can just take over if you get the first kill in a fight, just rolling them over
he can engage onto fights very well and allow you to follow up. his combo rotation gives you an insane amount of time to anihilate.
very solid, can engage fights with his q+r from a long range, and you can ult to get into the thick of things and beat them down.
his ult alone can make people terrified to fight, he doesn't even need to take the ult and go in, he just has to ult and it becomes impossible for enemies to go in because of you.
can lock down enemies very well for you, can start fights nicely.
insane power for you. usually you are going to be in the middle of 3/4/5 people, so her ult can always knock them up and give you more time, as well has being very annoying to deal with in general.

you cannot be killed if taric ults properly when you go in. they will have about 3 seconds when you initially go in, and if they can't burst you down in that window you destroy every single one of them.
solid engages, can engage fights for you rather well, you can also start fights for him too.
very good with olaf, the speedups make him impossible to escape unless you flash or dash over walls
